mapper.sql: id, rule_name, attack_type, rule_content, description, risk_level, enabled, priority, hit_count, last_hit_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_monitor_rule WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY priority ASC
SELECT FROM sys_monitor_rule ORDER BY priority ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_monitor_rule WHERE attack_type = #{attackType} AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY priority ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_monitor_rule SET rule_name = #{ruleName}, attack_type = #{attackType}, rule_content = #{ruleContent}, description = #{description}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, enabled = #{enabled}, priority = #{priority}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
